series_metadata.series_title: PUBLIC RECORDS AND OTHER THIRD-PARTY REQUESTS
series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, original request, related correspondence, research, response, and other records relating to public records requests or other third-party requests upon the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format, then destroy. If converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years from date of final reply or resolution, then destroy. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
